decisions.title: Prioritize Sift Edge GUI Table View for Q2 launch
decisions.context: ENG-9883 in progress. Edge is a Build the Moat product that differentiates us from cloud-only competitors. Table view is critical for embedded deployment adoption.

arguments.for: Edge expands our addressable market to disconnected environments, directly supports Embed Deeper pillar. Impulse Space (customer facing SCIM issues) likely needs this.
arguments.against: Canvas Pass/Fail buttons (ENG-9437) and Family features may have higher immediate customer impact for existing user base.

decisions.title: Resolve FedRAMP Amplitude compliance blocking issue
decisions.context: ENG-9662 identifying requirements. Analytics instrumentation may violate compliance for gov customers. Affects signal collection for North Star metric.
decisions.blockedBy: Pending vendor assessment from Amplitude on FedRAMP compliance options

arguments.for: Unblocks gov/defense customer expansion (Build the Moat). Required for accurate Decisions Captured measurement.
arguments.against: Could switch analytics providers, but loses historical data and requires instrumentation rewrite.

decisions.title: Ship Canvas Pass/Fail Buttons before summer test season
decisions.context: ENG-9437 in progress. Test engineers need rapid pass/fail workflow. Supports 'Decisions Captured' North Star by reducing decision-to-action time.

arguments.for: Nail the Core - addresses #1 Canvas user request. Direct impact on decisions/customer metric. Summer is peak test season for aerospace customers.
arguments.against: Families candidate runs feature (ENG-9529-9534) may have broader architectural impact and should ship first.

decisions.title: Commit to Family Candidate Runs architecture
decisions.context: Multi-ticket effort (ENG-9529,9530,9531,9534,DES-61,ENG-7954) spans BE/FE/UX. Enables comparing test runs within families - core to Explore V2 value prop.

arguments.for: Nail the Core - families are foundational abstraction. Candidate runs unlock comparative analysis = more decisions captured per customer.
arguments.against: Complex cross-team effort. May delay other Explore V2 features like streaming aggregates (ENG-7847) that affect all users.

decisions.title: Address Impulse Space SCIM deactivation root cause
decisions.context: ENG-9788 investigating repeated auth failures. Premium customer experiencing reliability issues. Signal of potential systemic problem with auth pipeline.

arguments.for: Customer retention risk. Impulse is high-profile reference customer. Auth reliability is table stakes for Embed Deeper.
arguments.against: May be one-off configuration issue not worth dedicated investigation vs. scaling engineering for new features.

decisions.title: Approve Data Access Governance (DAG) framework
decisions.context: DOC-13 in progress. Establishes controls for who can access what data. Required for enterprise sales and compliance (FedRAMP, ITAR).

arguments.for: Build the Moat - differentiated security posture enables enterprise/gov sales. Unblocks multi-tenant compliance questions.
arguments.against: Implementation could slow feature velocity if access controls create UX friction or performance overhead.
